title: Vaklu officer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
'''[[Vaklu]] officer''' was a rank within [[General/Legends|General]] [[Vaklu]]'s military during the [[Onderon Civil War]].

They normally were armored in a light blue battle suit, and carried a one-hand [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] for ranged combat and a [[Vibrosword/Legends|vibrosword]] for melee dueling. These officers were akin to the rank of [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] in most armies, leading groups of approximately ten men.

==Notes and references==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
